reviews.title: Staff do their best + Quality Breakfast but Noisy Building
reviews.positives: We booked a suite but didn't quite like its location inside the hotel, asked if we can change and got a really good corner room (slight downgrade but that was completely fine for us) with a great view to rice fields. The lady who checked us in and changed our room was very nice and helpful, she even tried and succeeded to put some good and quiet neighbors in a nearby room after we complained about noise from the previous ones (see below). We could breath without an issue, there is ventilation and no bad smell. It was a good change and we could heal after coming from another place which had moldy smell. Laundry service was good and not too expensive. The breakfast was really really good, it felt like every single item and even ingredient was the best possible quality, it is a kind of breakfast you don't want to miss
reviews.negatives: It says soundproof, but it is not soundproof in any way. It looks like it was some other hotel which was bought by Wyndham, and the original builders didn't know anything about soundproofing at all. There is a large enough hole left beneath the entrance door after closing it. Windows are single layer, the worst thing is that there are holes inside the "wall" between your and your neighbors balcony, I wonder who was the genius to design it like that. You can put your hand inside these holes and shake hands with your neighbor. They can also see your room from their balcony through these holes so you just have to keep curtains partly closed. If someone is sitting on their balcony and talking, nearby rooms will hear them even with their windows closed. The floor is tiles, so when someone drags furniture even below your room, you will hear it. The walls are even "better", we had only one neighbor room, we heard they came late night to their room, and some dude began to roar like a tiger, then went to the balcony and started talking, after that we could hear them showering and constantly hitting something in their bathroom, after they checked out we heard the staff repairing something in that room after their stay which is hilarious. As mentioned above - after they left, we got some quiet neighbors we barely heard, but still, it is more of a problem of hotel "soundproofing" than the guests themselves, the building is poorly designed in that regard, but at least staff try their best to make your life easier.

reviews.title: Little "NO" Beach
reviews.text:
Before book consider that there is no beach at all anywhere near thus hotel. The beach disappeared on 2014 because if environmental impact. You must take their bus to go to a beach(times not suitable) where during winter months the waves are so strong that one of us had an accident which caused strong neck pain and headaches.
Beside that the hotel is pretty old, although the room was spacious but with a lot of ants. Pool was small as ND crowded. 
Breakfast was seen as rich in the eye, the quality was so bad that we almost could not eat anything, even the cheese that we like so much was impossible to eat, like plastic. Bad cooking, made hours ago and bad quality. 
If you need transportation anywhere besude their shuttle service, they charge it extremely high. Overpriced was the spa as well. The behavior of the staff which comes to  talk to you socializing in the breakfast area in the morning is quite fake and not truly because of concern

reviews.title: Nice but noisy.
reviews.positives: Nice property. I liked the breakfast and the pool.
reviews.negatives: This hotel seems to attract noisy guests, from the drunk woman singing at the top of her lungs in the room above us to screaming kids. It’s a very nice hotel, but not for people seeking peace.

reviews.title: Better to stay at other hotel
reviews.text:
We had high hopes for this stay because the place itself was nice and the rooms looked decent upon arrival. Unfortunately, the service completely ruined the experience.

There was a small bathroom mirror that appeared to be poorly installed. The moment my friend entered the bathroom, the mirror suddenly fell and shattered. Thankfully, no one was injured but it could have easily caused serious harm. We planned to report it after breakfast, but when we returned to our room, housekeeping had already entered and removed the broken mirror without informing us.

When we later reported the incident, we were told that we would be held liable for the damage because they “couldn’t determine whether it was intentional or not.” That response was honestly shocking. Why would any guest intentionally break a mirror in their own room? Instead of showing concern about a potential safety hazard due to improper installation, they immediately assumed liability on our part.

To make matters worse, we also availed of their laundry service. Several of our white clothes came back with visible stains. When we reported this, their only explanation was, “Maybe there was something wrong with your other clothes that caused the stains.” There was no accountability, no effort to properly inspect the issue, and no offer of a solution.

The property itself may look nice, but service and guest safety matter more. Unfortunately, based on our experience, both were handled poorly.

reviews.title: SMOKERS DELIGHT
reviews.text:
If you are a smoker, this hotel is for you. There is a smoking area all across the front of the hotel and also across the back at the pool. There are open windows and doors going into the lobby, restaurant and bar so all the smoke from front and back goes through all those areas as well. Nothing like having smoke for breakfast! I would not set foot in the 'fitness' area - it is in the basement with no windows or air. Really grungy.
The 'ocean view' is over a farmers field with cows and just behind the huge new Marriot they are building on the beach which I am told will take 3 years of hammering. It is a long walk to the beach but you can see a glimpse of it if you have a room on the front, but then you have the noise, not only construction but loudspeaker selling something at all hours of the night. The location is very far from the Old Town and taxis are expensive. The hotel does not provide shuttles. The breakfast was good.

The semi-open lobby was extremely hot, and even after asking the front desk 3 times, we were only told “we are cleaning the room, please wait” and just let us wait there . 3. Despite the delayed check-in and poor room condition, the hotel was unwilling to offer a late check-out.

One of the worst hotel stays we have had in Vietnam.

I booked a room for a large bed and they didn't give us a large bed- they put two twin beds together and thought it was okay and it was not as it was uncomfortable and inconvenient. reviews.title: Misleading Property Listing – Avoid
reviews.text:
Our experience at Wyndham Garden Hoi An Cua Dai Beach was far below expectations and largely driven by misleading information.

The listing promoted key features including an “infinity pool with panoramic sea views,” “private beach,” “supervised kids’ pool,” and “rooftop ocean-view dining.” None of these were actually available.

These are not minor discrepancies—they are core selling points and directly influenced our booking decision.

Service and hygiene were also concerning:

Extremely limited vegetarian/vegan breakfast despite repeated requests

Constant sleep disruption due to roosters from neighbouring properties (around 3am daily)

One meal contained a piece of steel wool—this is a serious hygiene concern. The staff response was casual, with no proper apology or acknowledgment of the risk

Poor housekeeping standards (basic items like body wash not refilled for 4 guests over 5 nights)

Overall, this stay did not meet basic expectations of accuracy, hygiene, or service.

The only positives were the convenient location and one standout staff member, Vivian, who genuinely tried to help.

reviews.text: A clean & tidy hotel.  Reception staff excellent. Bar staff tend to go missing at happy hour, buy one get one free, second free drink you constantly trying to find staff. When happy hour finished plenty of staff available.  Room staff had to ask 3 times for more soap & toilet paper.  The room average had a ocean view, yes overlooked ocean but also a building site , not quite what the pictures show.  The beach out front terrible & the pool & facilities on the beach in state of disrepair . The pool was green.  Breakfast & meals of a good standard , coffee hit & miss depended on who made it . At $11 Aust dollars for 2 coffees, sent 3 coffees back not able to be drank. Everything attracts 15% tax & service charge on top of cost. So meals & drinks with 15% on top of already inflated prices are quite expensive . Top restaurants in Old town a lot cheaper & quality better. The Gym was good & internet  good . Pool at resort excellent. Stayed 7 days rate it about 7.5.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I had a nice beautiful ocean front balcony. Some nights, I could hear the roar of the waves soothing me to sleep. They had daily activities at the hotel to experience. Linda did a great job conducting the Vietnamese language class. We had fun and I learned a lot.  Sunny was everything! Sunny helped with arranging tours, airline flights, arranged a private tour for me, was full of helpful information and advice. The entire staff was always smiling, pleasant, friendly, considerate and helpful. The hotel was beautiful and always very clean. They have free bikes for guests to take and ride, they have a full free daily breakfast buffet, a spa where I enjoyed a full hour massage with additional pedicure, and guests have a 1-day pass for access to the beach club across the street. Along with the hotel's restaurant menu, there is also a nice, Vietnamese family owned restaurant next door to the hotel.
reviews.negatives: Although you can walk/ride through the neighborhood, It isn't close to the walkable business area near Ancient Town. However, if you prefer your lodging to be away from the activity, you're only a 10 ride when you're ready to indulge.

reviews.title: Not 5* property
reviews.text: Staff is great. It is a good 3* hotel tho, looks cheapish. Simple furniture, quite used bed mattress... Breakfast was great. Overal u can get better in HoiAn

reviews.title: The most welcoming team ever—felt like home with their constant support and genuine care!
reviews.positives:
I stayed here for a month, and it was great. The team is probably the most welcoming group I’ve come across. Super friendly, always happy to help, and ready to fix anything that came up right away.

They made me feel totally at home from day one, which is rare to find. It felt more like staying with family than at a hotel. If you’re looking for a place with good vibes and awesome people, this is it!

reviews.title: Would have been perfect if ...
reviews.text:
The swimming pool was great, too bad the mixed-gender sauna was off-limits to guests, unless they paid VND 300k (in January 2026). That's an insane price to quote for a small sauna and steam room. 

The breakfast menu is okay and varied. Location is pretty good and central in Cua Dai area.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean room and comfortable bed. Location is fantastic as you can go to the beach by simply crossing the street, and take a 10-minute taxi to old town.
reviews.negatives: Coffee machine was too slow. Orange juice was not natural. Guests should have the option of reserving bikes (instead of first-come, first-serve policy).

reviews.title: Everything was good except a broke coffee machine

Coffee machine was broke . During breakfast when we asked they said it was broke and we had to use condensed milk.even fresh milk was not available .

Our friends stayed for two nights - even they faced this problem .how can a coffee machine be broke for two days and not rectify it ?

reviews.title: Very nice stay with everything we needed. Handy shuttle to the old town twice a day. Beach access across the street. We

reviews.title: Old and saggy mattress but overall it was okay
reviews.text:
밑에 한국말로도 적엇어요
Stayed here for 6nights.
Mixed reviews on staff as some staff were extremely friendly and some werent. Especially the nail care lady (Lynh) did a really poor job on gel polish however she insisted that is because of my small nails thats why she had to paint over my fingers to look better? The manicure i had started tearing apart from the first night. I spend 1million dong(70 AUD) which wasnt cheap in Australia either for my nails and pedis, it was like 70 bucks down the drain.
We stayed at room 620, which was on the top floor. View was amazing, we really loved the view. However the guests next to our room constantly smoked in their balcony, the ciggarette smell came in to our room even when the balcony door closed which was disgusting.
The mattress definitely needs to be replaced as it sounds squeaky even with the small movement the the middle of the mattress was sagging. We couldnt have a good sleep in that bed. Later we thought we should have asked for a room change, regret we didnt.
We loved the shuttle bus, brekky and the gym downstaires. Next time if we stay here again, hoping that we dont stay next to either smokers or in the old mattress.
여기서 6박 7일 묵엇어요. 조식도 괜찮고 가격도 괜찮고 다 괜찮은데 일단 침대가 가운데가 푹꺼져서 너무 불편햇고 조금 움직일째마다 스프링 소리가 너무 많이 나서 무슨 귀곡 산장에 온것같은 느낌. 옆방에 사람들이 베란다서 하루 종일 담배를 펴서 담배냄새가 방안으로 다 들어왓고 베란다에 말려둔 티셔츠에 담배냄새가 뱃어요. 가격대비 괜찮은 호텔인데 다만 침대나 옆방 사람들담배필경우는 방 바꿔달라고 하시길 권해드려요.

reviews.text:

Both rooms and all the facilities were extremely clean.
The staff in all departments were very helpful, friendly and professional.

reviews.positives: Stay was relaxing and enjoyable. The room was clean and comfortable. Staff were very friendly, eager to help and answer any questions. Lyli was exceptionally helpful. It was great having bikes available free of charge to bike up and down the beach road, through rice paddies and into Hoi An old town. Scooters are available to rent on the corner just two doors down from the hotel. The beach and beach club across the street was the perfect place to hang out and enjoy some local life.

reviews.title: It wasn't as I expected!
reviews.text: From May 15, 2026. It was a two-day stay during a birthday trip for my wife as a couple. Many staff members were kind and made for a good atmosphere. However... it was far from the sea, and when we reserved a room on the ocean side, we experienced the rumbling and noise of a construction site right in front of us! There was also karaoke noise at night! On the second day, we asked to change rooms. The breakfast was delicious. The outdoor venue had a pool view and was beautiful, but the door was heavy and not automatic, which made it difficult for elderly guests to open and close it. As a result, due to the heat, everyone ended up retreating inside! There was also no smart TV, only local channels... The cost performance is definitely not good. Probably won't be coming back. I hope this is helpful.

reviews.text: I had an excellent stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An Hotel. The facilities were well maintained, but the real highlight was the staff. In particular, Sue deserves special appreciation. reviews.title: We enjoyed our stay very much.
reviews.positives: Nice size room and comfortable bed. Great breakfast and friendly staff.  We really enjoyed our stay there.

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel BUT....
reviews.text: The Hotel was very clean, well maintained and the pool was clean with fresh towels. Unfortunately my wife spent a challenging 3 days in Hoi An hospital which the Hotel knew about,  which was of no fault of the Hotels. I requested specifically at reception that my younger teens be allowed to order food and drink as they needed while I attended hospital daily with my wife, yet upon them ordering food, it never arrived so they were forced to leave Hotel grounds to find food elsewhere which is what I did not want, whilst they did not need baby sitting, there is a global understanding regardless of culture that ones children are important and what I asked help for was not a big request. I expressed my disbelief to Hotel staff and also learned the food was still charged to my account. What made things more disappointing was upon my return daily I was never asked how my wife was, I was only hard sold their next dinner special or happy hour menu whilst trying to get to the elevator. Comparative to other restaurants the food was the most overpriced we had experienced from 7 hotels so far for no justifiable reason which explained the empty restaurant in the evening. So 2 star for reception and restaurant staff despite the bell boys and security team being excellent.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent hotel and the value can't be beat. Breakfast was huge with lots of options. Pool was very nice and in the sun most of the day. No problems finding chairs even though there are a limited number of chairs for a hotel this size. Staff were great - welcoming and very helpful. Rooms were a good size. Beds were comfortable. Views on the river side are good from the upper floors. Free shuttle to Hoi An three times a day. Gym was small but had an adequate amount of equipment. The beach is very nice and an easy walk across the street.
reviews.negatives: WiFi was sketchy and would disconnect quite a lot. This is something that they should remedy. Somewhat secluded which is good and bad. It was quiet but not many decent restaurants close by. We mostly went into Hoi An or to An Bang beach to eat at night. Closest half way decent grocery store is 800m away.

reviews.title: Ok but not efficient.
reviews.text:
PROS- nice staff, helpful and kind
Very close to cua dai beach. Beach was awesome.
Aircon was not in restaurant or lobby. Everything is left open letting in mozzies and extreme heat. Doesnt make sense have coolers with all windows and doors open. Tried to charge me for 2 waters when we only used one. Shuttle only goes at 10am and by that time its to hot. Also only 1 pickup time around 4pm. Gimmicks e.g. free movie and food but only to find out you have to purchase to get free. Didn't enjoy all that much. I'm sure theres better places. Kids did enjoy the pool. The gym was also decent. Restaurant was sub par in food. Breakfast was ok with rotated menu. The HiHo shop next door was amazing.

reviews.title: A wonderful hotel with high value for such luxury and class in Hoi An.
reviews.positives: I would rate this hotel as one of my top five of hotels I’ve stayed at throughout Asia. Impeccably maintained, stylish decor and tiling, the food was excellent, staff extra helpful and friendly.
reviews.negatives: Hard to find anything bad to say other than I wish the pillows had been softer. This is a common problem with hotel pillows.

I visited the hotel on the Valentine's weekend. It was a beautiful hotel. The check in got a little delayed and we were not satisified with the room since the balcony view was obstructed as the room was on the 2nd floor.

The manager heard our grievance and managed to allocate another room on a higher floor. Though the room size was smaller comparitively, it met our requirement.

The staff is very friendly but a bit slow with the service. Not deducting any points for the slow service cause the location is dreamy and has a laid back vibe. There is some construction going on bang opposite to the hotel and the view from the balcony is not that pleasant.

The spa was wonderful and the masseuse was very courteous and skilled.

reviews.title: Very helpful staff but our experience wasn’t as hoped.
reviews.text:
Naively this hotel wasn’t on the beach as thought. The weather wasn’t great and still coming out of the rainy season mid December so the beach club and beach over the road looked very dirty and unused. The pool at the hotel looked a bit tired but the weather meant we didn’t get to use it anyway. 
Unluckily our room had an awful view over a kind of scrap yard, who made a horrendous noise about 9am on our first morning. Reception were very apologetic and said it would not happen again. The next morning the hotel were making noise mending their own roof above our room. So unfortunately not a perfect experience for us. 
On a positive, the hotel was very nice. Breakfast was great with lots of choice. Location wise, it was only a short taxi ride to the centre of Hoi An. The staff were very helpful. A great little restaurant next door to the hotel too.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel
reviews.text: This was a great hotel and was very obliging- allowed early check-in and late check out. Also allowed us to swap transfer to return to airport instead of pick up. Free bikes were available and the pool was lovely. The family bunk was spacious with a great bath tub! Beach was 3 minutes away with a nice little cafe as well. My only grumble would be that the free shuttle only runs twice a day but at 3pm and 4pm - you cannot get in and out of town. We had to use a lot of grab taxi. Also breakfast was mediocre- a basic range of eggs but lacked bacon some days. The local dishes were nice but again quite limited. Restaurant was also quite pricey when you added plus plus.

We are looking forward to welcoming you back to our hotel. 
Wyndham Garden Hoi An with love!

reviews.title: Everything you need but just a little far out
reviews.text:
LOVE their private beach, and the rooms were clean and spacious.  Breakfast buffet pretty good too.  

The weather wasn't great so we didn't get to use the beach/pool much.  If we had to do it again we'd stay more in the center of town and come out to go to the beaches, but we knew it wasn't in town when booking.  Cannot fault the hotel, staff, or facilities.

reviews.title: Loved this stay, beautiful property

reviews.negatives: Distance from attractions

reviews.title: Good stay if you want to be close to hoi an beach
reviews.text: Hotel advertising pictures were misleading. It's private beach is 5 minutes drive and 20min bike ride,  not connect to the hotel.  Actually it's private beach is part of a restaurant beach, that allow the vendors to come in and will not leave you along once you buy from one. The beach sand is rough and the strand is full of cigarette butts.  Though they provide shuttle to the beach and old town,  it s not convenient at all.  The hotel is 20 feet from the neighbors fence,  so unless you have the beach view,  the rest of the other rooms you will look straight to the neighbors houses.  The hotel is relatively new,  but the decor is not cheerful,  I guess it's kind of like the old colonial French style.  Rooms are clean and roomy.  Breakfast is more typical western continental,  with very limited Vietnamese foods.  Staffs just somewhat helpful only.

reviews.title: just one block off the beach and in close proximity to the old town with all the comfort of a resort
reviews.positives: staff very friendly. Management took care of the small problems I had immediately. The specials at the spa and pool food promotions, as well as the cooking demonstration were all terrific.  free shuttle to the old town convenient.

One drawback -  Location is slightly away from old town and hotel shuttle is only available for 2-3 slots with strictly fixed schedule.  We were about 6-7 mins late and it. reviews.title: A little disappointed
reviews.text:
Our stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An had some bright spots, especially thanks to the fantastic staff, but also came with a few disappointments that might influence whether we’d return.

🌟 Highlights
	•	Staff & Service: The best part of our stay. The staff were top-notch—friendly, responsive, and helpful throughout our trip. Some spoke English well, and they made a great effort to accommodate requests, including arranging airport transport smoothly.
	•	Comfort: The bed was very comfortable, and the room was clean and well maintained despite having an older, Spanish-style villa design.
	•	Bathroom Setup: Nice shower and separate tub, good water pressure and temperature.

⚠️ What Could Be Improved
	•	“Sea View” Misleading: The ocean view was underwhelming due to a construction site directly between the hotel and the beach, blocking the scenic appeal.
	•	Noise Issues: Soundproofing was poor. We heard loud noises from outside and other rooms. One day there was an extremely loud speaker blaring nearby for hours.
	•	Wi-Fi & Breakfast: Wi-Fi was functional but slow (under 100 Mbps). The breakfast was just okay—small omelets and oddly roasted bacon that didn’t match American-style expectations.
	•	Location: It’s far from Hoi An Old Town, so we had to use Grab regularly (~78,000 VND per ride). It’s not a walkable distance to the main attractions.
	•	Odd Charge for Ice: We were surprised and confused that the hotel charged us when we simply requested ice for our room—something usually complimentary at most hotels.

🧼 Other Notes
	•	Amenities were fine and replenished upon request.
	•	Rooms and bathrooms were clean, though a bit dated.
	•	The value for the price was reasonable.

✅ Final Thoughts

While the staff left a great impression and the hotel had good bones, the distance from town, noise issues, and a few strange charges made us rethink if we’d stay here again. If proximity to Hoi An’s main areas is important to you—or if you’re expecting a clear beach view—you may want to explore other options.

Overall Rating: ★★★★☆ (3.75/5)

reviews.title: Pretty good.......but
reviews.text:
The hotel is as my title suggests, pretty good. But for a couple of things that would get it 4 stars. 
Checking in was easy and pretty quick. Staff at front desk were excellent, as are those throughout the hotel. All bright happy and smiling and very eager to help if required.
The restaurant and buffet is quite good with a good variety for local tastes, but could offer a little more for non-Asian guests. 
The pool and fitness centre were both good, although the pool is over chlorinated, meaning stinging eyes if you have them open while swimming. 
The rooms are a great size with a sofa and coffee table and great bathroom with walk-in shower and separate bath. Which bring me to my issue.......the shocking bed. Whilst its a king size, the one in our room had the worst mattress I've ever tried to sleep on.  It should have been replaced a long time ago, due to collapsed springs which constantly squeaked and would wake my wife when I got in or out of bed. It was anything but comfortable and easily the worst mattress I've encountered in my travels through SE Asia. I'd like to think that this is a one off and that the beds in other room would be of a good standard, but I can only offer my opinions based on my experience, so who knows.
The shuttle bus to the Old City of Hoi An is great with 2 drop off times, but only one return pick up time. Whis I find a bit odd.
Would I recommend This hotel to friends? Probably, but with reservations as mentioned above.

I’d definitely recommend this hotel and hope to visit again soon!

reviews.title: Great stay with scope for improvement
reviews.text:
The hotel is a perfect bang for the buck. The staff is very courteous and well mannered and always ready to help. Both Mr. Sec phuong and hieu were helpful. 

The location is good if you want to relax at the cua dai beach which is much less crowded than an bang beach and a 2 minute walk. The an bang beach is also only 5 mins away and offers more cafes and things to do. The old town is a 20 minute drive. The hotel operates a free shuttle/taxi service in morning and evening which is helpful. We used it once and the driver was very kind. The hotel also offered us a free one way airport drop which was amazing! 

However the sea view room is overlooking the marriot resort construction so only half of the view is sea and the other half is concrete. I think it'll stay this way for a long time till the resort is completed. 

The hotel offers a good breakfast buffet. The chef made a few vegetarian dishes especially for us which was a nice gesture. He also served fresh rice on our table personally so thanks a lot for that! There were cereals and fruits if you're a vegetarian. The hotel also offers beach towels and cycles for free. However there is less ventilation and no AC in the hall which is a little uncomfortable but not that noticeable. Overall a good stay if you're on a budget. If you want to explore the old town though, I wiuld suggest staying near there and coming to the beach for a single day. Much more convenient that way.

reviews.title: Relaxing stay
reviews.text:
Rooms - Rooms are spacious enough with comfortable beds and pillows. Fast and reliable internet.
Kids loved the spacious bathtub.

Location - A very short ride away from Old Town and close to beaches.  The hotel also has a shuttle twice a day.  Many convenience stores around to buy snacks, beer/wine, medicines etc.

View - The hotel's ocean view is not that great as it is set a bit away from the beach. Further this view is mostly obscured by an under construction Marriott resort.

Breakfast - A very uninspired selection for vegetarians/vegans - sad noodles and some sauteed veggies.  Given how easy it is to custom make some Vietnamese dishes with tofu etc., the staff didn't seem to care much.  
We ended up carrying our own food at breakfast, so for vegetarians I'd save money and give their breakfast a skip.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable
reviews.text:
Good stay here. We arrived after dark and we’re a bit concerned because there was NOTHING going on and there didn’t seem to be any other guests (there were 2 other people only until a bus load arrived the next day). When we woke up the next day and explained we realised the hotel was actually pretty good! 
It’s in between A Bang beach which is where most of the tourists stay and the old town. It costs about AU$4 to get a Grab in to the old town. 
The staff were absolutely gorgeous. So sweet and lovely and helpful. There was a particularly lovely lady in the restaurant and I’m kicking myself that I don’t remember her name!
The pool is relaxed.  The spa is great - we had massages there and it was really easy to book in.  
All in all it’s in a quiet spot but you have access to the hotel pool and the pool clubs across the road (on the beachfront) which is pretty cool and it’s a 5 min trip in to town.

Their breakfast spread was also great with choices from egg, soup and Vietnamese live food station. 
IF you are keen to explore other areas, the hotel provides free shuttle bus to An Bang Beach and Old Town area. Almost all staffs speak English well and no need to worry about a thing, they always can help you!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel
reviews.text:
We stayed for 3 nights here. Although on Google it shows as a beach front property, but it is not. The public beach is a 2 minutes walk through. 
The room was very comfortable and had 2 queen beds. Neat and very clean. 
The breakfast has a decent spread and some lovely coffee. Some local dishes and some international ones. 
The staff is the best and very helpful. 
You get free bicycles which are well maintained. 
Transport costs are slightly higher than outside but still very reasonable. 
There is a small cafe outside where you can rent bikes from. 
The check in was smooth and the front office and reservation staff is super polite and helpful. 
15 minutes to old town by cab or bike. They have free shuttle 3 times a day from hotel. 
Over-all a lovely stay

Es gab aber auch Shuttle Angebote zu einem großen Strand & zur Altstadt (10-14-18 Uhr dreimal täglich) das Foto ist von dem Ort wo man mit dem strandshuttle hingebracht wird. Es gibt kostenlos liegen wenn man etwas trinkt für knapp 50ct.
Alle konnten sehr gut englisch und waren sehr hilfsbereit. Die Frühstückssituation fand ich sehr wuselig. Es gab frische Früchte und relativ viel Auswahl, die Gästestruktur hat mir nicht so gefallen dafür kann das Hotel aber nichts. 
Die Klimaanlage war relativ laut war aber noch ok.. 
die Massage im Hotel war toll und hatte ein relativ gutes Angebot. Dass hier so aktiv Ausflüge verkauft wurden empfanden wir nicht so. Das Hotel war sehr sauber was uns wichtig war und sehr gut schallisoliert
reviews.negatives: Unser Zimmer hat leider unangenehm und etwas modrig gerochen. Auf dem Balkon gab es nur zwei Hochstühle ohne Tisch daher nicht so lauschige Atmosphäre.

 The room wasn't cleaned properly on that day. The room keys wouldn't open the lock. It required some intervention.

That apart, we have no other complaints.

reviews.title: CPSConsult Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates 252 A very friendly, welcoming, service orientated, small scale, personal 3.5* to 4* Hotel well located.
reviews.text:
Let me preface my review by stating categorically I would book & stay here again next time in Hoi An. 

Namely thanks to all the wonderful staff with their amazing guest-centric service. The staff’s desire to please guests & meet all needs is remarkable. 

Alas, yet again another example of a Vietnamese hotel ownership over-hyping, over-promising, over-rating, over-pledging what is actually a wonderful small, friendly & personal  3.5 Star to 4 Star Hotel as a supposed 5 Star establishment. 

Such misleading rating makes the job of the superb staff a difficult recovery job from check-in to check-out. 

The hotel is well positioned near the beach (one plot back from the beach front) with partial beach views. Full beach views from southern rooms. 

Just a 12 minute taxi to old Hoi An town or 25-35 minute gentle cycle depending on the route taken & peddle cadence. 

The rooms offer all any guest needs & are a decent size, well set out, nicely furnished with all the usual fixtures, fittings, wi-fi, entertainment electronics, mini-fridge, kettle & beverages of a 3.5-4* hotel. 

The air-conditioning is great, constant, quiet & fresh. The bathrooms are large with twin-headed showers & baths plus the usual toiletries of a 3.5-4* hotel. 

The common areas are naturally furnished & welcoming while the public areas are open-plan, pleasant & comfortable to relax in & meet visitors in. 

A good solid breakfast with a nice range of Asian & Western foods on offer including pastries, cereals, fruits, hot cooked meals & a variety of beverages including a number of different coffees which was a pleasant change from other 3-4* hotels in Vietnam. 

The complimentary bicycles were a super touch, very useful & a game changer. So useful to nip to surrounding tailors, cafes, beaches, restaurants, shops & a variety of cycle routes into the Old Town of Hoi An. 

The mid-sized courtyard swimming pool suffices & is a cool change from the humidity of Hoi An. 

Most of all the staff from doormen, chambermaids, maintenance, security, waitresses,, receptionists to supervisors onto management all make every guest feel very welcome indeed. 

We stayed 3 very comfortable nights & had a great time based at the Wyndham Garden Hotel which is a solid 3.5* & if the owners actually update their ancient home-equipped gym / fitness suite? Well then they could even squeeze up into the tourist 4* bracket. 

Thank you to all the great staff whom took so much time to try to make our stay the advertised 5* experience. 

Thanks to the very attentive reception team of Mr Luc who went out his way to assist with issues in the gym. Other receptionists Vy, Sunny & Linda to name a few. 

The great Security / Maintenance Manager Mr. Winter Dong & his team of doormen Phuong, Dein, Chong, Chau, Nima & others.

Waiter Mr. Binh who learned our names on day one! 

Tran & her management team who all showed enthusiasm to take on board feedback. 

A good stay indeed.

reviews.title: Spring Break
reviews.text:
Our stay at Little Beach was lovely!  The hotel is very nice; I love all of the lanterns everywhere and the beautiful wood.  We ate in the restaurant several times.  The breakfast buffet and omelet station was fantastic.  Dinner was good and service was attentive.  I had some trouble with the airlines, so the staff were very helpful, including Paul, the general manager.  They were also very helpful with securing taxis to and from stations and old town.
The only drawback was the location of the sea.  In order to go to the beach you had to take a shuttle bus about 10 minutes away.  Or there was a beach club across the street, with a great pool, but the ocean was blocked by giant sand bags.
I would stay there again!

Leider wurde das Zimmer erst nach 15:00 Uhr gereinigt. Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet. Die Preise für das Essen im Hotelrestaurant war für vietnamesische Verhältnisse zu teuer. Hervorzuheben ist die Freundlichkeit des Personals, vor allem Sunny von der Rezeption und die Dame die für das Frühstück verantwortlich war. Da das Hotel nicht direkt am Strand liegt, kann der gegenüberliegende Beach Club genutzt werden. Der Strand und der Pool des Clubs ist sehr schön.

reviews.title: Great 4 night stay
reviews.text:
Stayed at Little Hoi Ann for a four day rest before flying back to Australia via Ho Chi Min City.

Hotel is well located between the beach and old Hoi An town.  They provided hourly shuttle buses to the beach and the town (and return).  Otherwise taxi to town is approx.  AUD$7 - $9 one way.  For approx. AUD$28 one way they also provide an airport shuttle to hotel from Danang airport and vice versa which is approx. 45 minute drive.

We had a room overlooking the beach which meant we faced east and got the early morning sunrise at 5.30'ish each morning.  Our room did not have block out curtains so if you are a sleeper like me who prefers total darkness then be prepared for early morning awakenings - which probably isn't a bad thing as it makes you get up and out early before the day becomes hot.  My preference would be for block out blinds in eastern  facing rooms but that is my personal preference - otherwise totally enjoyed our stay.

We didn't visit their beach until the last day and now wished we had gone down earlier in our stay as it was very relaxing even if you didn't go for a swim as their is a beer garden/restaurant which you can laze back in and enjoy the ambiance.  We did swim in the pool everyday  which was clean and very relaxing

All in all a great way to prepare for a long trip back home

reviews.title: Wunderbar, wenn man dem Trubel der Altstadt entfliehen möchte
reviews.positives: Sehr nah am Strand, kostenloser Shuttle in die Altstadt, sehr nettes und zuvorkommendes Personal, schönes Ambiente, viele nette Lokale in der Gegend

reviews.title: Nice Peaceful Stay
reviews.text: The hotel is located  little ways from Hoi An, an area that is currently being developed (don't mind the construction).  We rented a scooter for the time we were there to get around easily.  Nice quiet beach out front the hotel and lots of amenities around us.  Everyone was very friendly and helpful.  Beautiful buffet breakfast.

reviews.title: Hervorragendes Hotel
reviews.positives: Das Hotel hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Die Zimmer sowie das Badezimmer waren schön und groß. Große Auswahl beim Frühstücksbuffet und hilfsbereite Nitarbeiter. Schöner Pool und auch der Pool beim beach Club war nicht zu beanstanden. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
reviews.negatives: Einziger Minuspunkt war eine Kleinigkeit bei der Abreise: man monierte, dass der Wäschebeutel in unserem Zimmer fehle😵‍💫. Ein Witz - wir haben den nicht angerührt und er ist wahrscheinlich 0,0001 Cent wert. Noch dazu wird man beim Shopping schliesslich ausreichend mit Plastiktüten versorgt. Also no need. Hatte sich dann aber zügig erledigt. Scheint lt Internet eine relativ bekannte Masche zu sein.

Rooms were spacious with attached balcony with partial ocean view. 
Overall property was neatly maintained.

Ms Lilly  at the reception was so supportive and kind in giving all the necessary assistance.

Very good spread of breakfast.

Only one disappointment what we had was due to restaurant staff, three of our guest were not well so we requested for the takeaway and with prior approval we started packing, but the way restaurant staff started staring as if we were stealing something.

Rest all were fantastic.
Hope management will look into this and in future other guest may not have an awkward situation like we had.

reviews.title: Excellent

Nachdem wir aber die meisten Strände in der Nähe abgefahren sind haben wir unseren Lieblingsstrand rechts vom Resort Victoria gefunden. Dort konnte man um nicht mal 2 € pro Person pro Tag liegen mit Schirm von einem kleinen Restaurant mieten. Wirklich traumhaft dort! Man kann sich gratis im Hotel Fahrräder ausleihen, zu diesem Strand sind es nicht mal 5 Minute mit dem Rad. Wir sind mehrmals hingefahren, der Strand war untertags beinahe leer( nur wenige Hotel Gäste vom Victoria Resort auf den vorderen Liegen) nur ab späten Nachmittag sind ein paar Einheimische gekommen. Haben eine wunderschöne Zeit dort verbracht!

reviews.title: A quieter place to enjoy

Das Gym ist im Keller ohne Fenster und kein einladender Raum. Es roch teilweise sehr muffig und wir haben es nicht so genutzt wie gewünscht.

reviews.title: Good overall, nice breakfast. good coffe. warm and helpful staff

Love it!

reviews.title: Eine Oase der Entspannung mit hervorragendem Personal
reviews.positives: Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und zuvorkommend. Sunny von der Rezeption stand uns bei allen Fragen hilfreich zur Seite. Danke dafür. Das Hotel liegt in Strandnähe und man kann kostenlos den Beachclub auf der anderen Straßenseite nutzen. Das Zimmer war sauber und geräumig, das Bad mit Dusche und Badewanne ausgestattet. Außerdem waren kostenlos Bademäntel verfügbar. Das Frühstück war sehr umfangreich, Saft , Obst, warme und kalte Speisen, Joghurt, sogar Eiskaffee war vorhanden. Im Frühstücksraum war auch ausreichend groß, so das man immer einen Platz gefunden hat. Das Hotel bietet kostenlos Fahrräder an und zudem 2x täglich einen Shuttle nach Hoi An. Da wir den Aufenthalt eher zum entspannen als zum Sightseeing nutzen wollten, war die Entfernung zur Stadt (4km) kein Problem. Das Hotel hat einen Spa- und einen Sportbereich, beides haben wir aufgrund der Kürze des Aufenthaltes nicht genutzt. >Wir haben uns rundherum wohlgefühlt und können das Hotel uneingeschränkt empfehlen.

Das Hotel ist sehr empfehlenswert. Die Lage war für uns optimal, da es direkt am Meer liegt, einen schönen Pool und kostenlosen Strandzugang beim Strandclub (Pool und Liegen) hat, in unmittelbarer Nähe sind diverse Restaurants.
Wir konnten kostenfrei Fahrräder ausleihen um die nähere Gegend zu erkunden.

Es werden im Hotel Shuttles angeboten um nach Hoi An Altstadt zu fahren, zurück geht es relativ früh, daher haben wir immer ein Grab Taxi genommen.
Wir können es 100%ig empfehlen!

reviews.title: We will be back

reviews.negatives: Das Hotel liegt weder am Strand (6 Minuten mit dem Taxi zum A Bang Beach), noch in der Innenstadt (15 Minuten mit dem Taxi zur Old Town Hoi An). Uns hat das nicht gestört, im Gegenteil, wir waren sogar froh darüber, dass wir eine etwas ruhigere Lage hatten.

Hotel is small enough, but staff and amenities are good. 
I will definitely recommend this hotel to those who want to spend quiet time in Da Nang.

reviews.title: 16 nights of bliss

Beach is about 40 meters across the road. Breakfast has reasonable choice buffet style with an omelette station. Pool was quite small but most people head to the beach anyway which has a swim up bar in silk club and cheap drinks during the day. The sea and beach are gorgeous. It's our first time but won't be the last! Free shuttle to Hoi an but taxis are so cheap it's not an issue. Thank you to the staff see you again soon!

reviews.title: good value for the money
reviews.text:
decent location near the beach, quiet at night, friendly staff, large bathroom with big bathtub that fit 2 easily, huge bed (2x120cm wide fitted together) free bicycle, free airport transfer (1 trip free, the other trip is 350k vnd which is normal price for the area) nearby an bang beach. 15 mins by motor vehicle to hoi an old town. the staff are nice, massage is good, hotel overall in good condition, clean. the breakfast options a bit sparse. but there are many little cafés nearby 😉
Would recommend.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Der Service war herausragend, Sunny und das ganze Personal waren immer aufmerksam und sehr hilfsbereit. Das Frühstück war lecker. Die Lage war ruhig und es gab einen Shuttle Service zum Strand und in die Stadt.

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel & staff
reviews.text: Previous reviews have said it all and that's why I chose Wyndham Garden & we weren't disappointed.  The staff are all fantastic, very welcoming and keen to make your stay as good as possible.  Breakfast buffet and meals in general are really quite good, with various dishes including the daily soup, being changed daily for breakfast.  A large selection of foods, i doubt anyone could complain.  The hotel only being a 5 min walk away from Silk Club, which hotel guests have free access to, is really good, with a bar, pool, deck chairs & beach, is great. The hotel pool is quite good, as it's shaded for a lot of the day, so the water is pleasant. Only 10 mins from old town and free shuttle twice a day. I'd find it hard to not stay here again on our visit. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Super
reviews.positives: Nettes Hotel, vor allem das personal super freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Frühstück buffet sehr vielfältig

reviews.title: Our stay at the Wyndham
reviews.text: Overall really nice stay , would have sat around the pool area much more but the drinks were more than double the price of the bars a few metres away , good breakfast but gets overrun with one night stay coach parties , shame about a huge construction site directly over the road , would like to have been informed of this , saying this we would stay here again

reviews.title: Unser Aufenthalt in dieser Urlaubsoase war traumhaft und wir haben uns sehr sehr wohl gefühlt!!!
reviews.positives: Die Lage des Hotels war optimal. Etwas ausserhalb von Hoi An, trotzdem mit dem Taxi in ca 10 Minuten mittendrin. Daher ruhig und abseits vom Trubel. Über eine wenig befahrene Straße erreicht man den Beachclub mit wunderschönem Pool und den traumhaften Sandstrand von Cua Dai mit Liegestühlen und Strandrestaurants. Das Frühstücksbüffet ließ keine Wünsche offen, das Personal immer und überall zur Stelle, so reizend, hilfsbereit und herzlich! In den Zimmern war es ruhig, moderne Badausstattung, alles sehr sauber.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: ２０２５年２月に５０㎡のプレミアスイートに１泊あたり邦貨１００００円ほどで６泊した。スイートとあるが、ベッドルームとリビングが分かれているわけではなく、広めのシティングスペースのあるタイプの部屋だった。黒檀を基調とする高級感のあるインテリアで居室の居心地はいい。コロニアル風の建物の小ぢんまりしたホテルでわかりやすいく豪華なわけではないが、一通りの設備が整い品良くまとまっている。オン・ザ・ビーチではないが、道を隔てた場所にあるビーチクラブが無料で利用でき、プライベートビーチ気分も味わえる。スタッフは皆親切で気が回り、気分良く滞在することができた。朝食時のレストランの賑わいからすると、それ以外の時間は驚くほど人が少なく、ホテルのプールは貸し切り状態で使えることもあった。団体客の受け入れをしており、そういった時にぶつかると、騒々しいのだが、彼らが長居することはないようで、すぐにまた落ち着きを取り戻す。華やかな演出には欠けるが、ゆったりとくつろぐにはいいホテルだと感じた。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Was uns gefallen hat? Einfach alles. Der Aufenthalt in diesem Hotel wird durch liebenswerten Damen der Rezeption, Yummy, Sunny and Lyly, zu einem unvergesslichen Trip. Alle privaten Problemchen wurden von diesen mit Hingabe gelöst, man fühlt sich rundum einfach wohl.
Auch im Restaurant wird professionell gearbeitet und Frau Stella kümmert sich um alles
reviews.negatives: Ein Zimmer mit Poolblick wäre ruhiger als ein Zimmer mit Naturblick

reviews.title: Very comfortable stay
reviews.text: Breakfast is not meant for Vegetarian Indians. Rest everything was excellent. The hotel provided free pick up from Da nang airport.

reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

reviews.title: Das ganze und immer sehr freundliche Personal hat uns einen angenehmen Aufenthalt geboten.
reviews.positives: Schönes und grosses Zimmer mit Blick auf das Meer. Das Frühstück, bei dem wir immer mit unserem Rufnamen begrüsst wurden,  war ausgezeichnet und reichhaltig mit gutem Kaffee, herzhaft zubereiteter Omelett oder Spiegeleier. Eine Reichhaltige Auswahl an verschiedenen Brote. Auch Asiatische Küche war zur Auswahl da. Es liess sich beim Essen an fast nichts mangeln. In einer kleinen, aber feinen Sauna konnte man sich für die bevorstehende Massage aufwärmen. Die Massagen waren immer zu vollster Zufriedenheit.
reviews.negatives: Als Folge vor dem Vietnamesischen Neujahrsfest war es etwas lauter als normalerweise.

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.text: We had a lovely stay at the Wyndham Garden in Hoi An. The staff were very friendly and helpful. The room clean and had character, although the doors in our room were made for hobbits. The complimentary breakfast was the best we've had compared to other hotels of similar standard. We had a room overlooking the river, which presented a nice view. The beach was just over the road and we would take early morning dips before hopping on our hired scooter to spend the day exploring Hoi An. Overall, we had a wonderful stay at the Wyndham Garden. Highly recommended.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Rooftop Room, Riverside View, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Super Preis Leistungsverhältnis und bestes Hotel auf unserer Reise durch Vietnam. Die Zimmer sind groß, modern und sauber. Großes Frühstücksbuffet, das ständig aufgefüllt wird, netter Pool und gute Lage am Strand mit Shuttleservice in die Altstadt.
Das  Personal ist äußerst aufmerksam und ehrlich freundlich und und unser ganz besonderes Dank geht an Linda, Lisa und Lilly!
